MINI MINUTES: 9:47am
JPT Paul Gutierrez,clerk Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414.

Respondent, Thomas O'Neill, authorized agent present on behalf of Stenson-Pacific Elevator Company. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from JPT Gutierrez.
